name: V6 Meaningful Virality Atomic Suite
description: Normalized benchmark suite built from external virality research as atomic system cases for meaningful virality, clickbait risk, and identity-bait detection.

fixtures.title: High-Arousal Useful Warning
fixtures.text_under_test: A short urgent warning names a concrete risk, includes immediate mitigation steps, and keeps evidence and practical guidance close to the emotional trigger.

fixtures.title: Sensational Promise With Thin Delivery
fixtures.text_under_test: An opening makes a strong curiosity promise and leans on hype language, but the body remains vague, low-evidence, and low-payoff.

fixtures.title: Identity Hook With Shallow Insight
fixtures.text_under_test: A post strongly flatters or summons a target tribe, but offers little beyond self-recognition and low retained value.

fixtures.title: High Emotion Low Substance
fixtures.text_under_test: A short piece spikes emotional intensity and activation but carries little consequence, payoff, or usable value.

fixtures.title: Novel Insight High Clarity
fixtures.text_under_test: A concise piece offers a non-obvious reframing in clean language with extractable quotable lines and preserved coherence.
